description: Trigger discrimination for the docs TOOLCHAIN/pipeline (this skill) vs organizing content by mode (diataxis-doc-organizer), generating API reference (api-doc-generator-designer), and the contribution-guide CONTENT (contribution-guide-author).

cases.prompt: Set up docs-as-code: in-repo docs, a generator, per-PR preview builds, CI link-checking and prose lint, tested code samples, and versioned deploys.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary) — generator, pipeline, CI checks, sample testing, and versioned publishing are the docs engineering. No content taxonomy and no guide content is being written.
cases.reason: Building the toolchain that keeps docs building, published, and honest is this skill's core scope.

cases.prompt: Organize the docs into tutorials, how-to, reference, and explanation and fix the mislabeled pages.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (reverse) — classifying content by mode is organization, not the build.
cases.reason: diataxis-doc-organizer shapes the content; this skill builds the pipeline that publishes it.

cases.prompt: Generate our API reference from the OpenAPI spec and keep it in sync with the API automatically.
cases.reason: api-doc-generator-designer designs generating reference from the API source of truth. The docs pipeline hosts the output, but the generation design is that skill's.

cases.prompt: Write the CONTRIBUTING guide explaining how to set up, branch, run tests, and get a PR merged.
cases.reason: contribution-guide-author writes the human-facing guide content. This skill designs the docs contribution mechanics/infra, not the guide's prose.
